In 5.18, the following rule shall -- 2 of 4 -- 'L^_n-"^g3(ijj ^^L^Ss^^^L "SJ8. Drawing of a train to an advanced position - (1) A train waiting for an authority to proceed shall not be allowed to draw out tipto an Advance Starter for despatch, except where track circuit or Axle Counter has been provided between the Starter and Advance Starter ta indicate the presence of a train in advanced position, (2) The provision of sub-rule (I) shall not apply in case of shunting of a train within a station section itself " ' / [No. 99/Ssfety (A&R)/19/9] SHANTINARAIN, Member Traffic, and Ex-Officio Secy. Note:— -jjle principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide notification number GSR 445(E), dated the 21st July, 1981* and subsequently amended vide Notifications number > (!)
